title: CreatorCraft
description: CreatorCraft is a modpack inspired by CreatorPack (sort of lol) that is a sort of vanilla+, and content creation modpack.
body:
CreatorCraft is a modpack inspired by CreatorPack (sort of lol) that is a sort of vanilla+, and content creation modpack. 

It features mods such as Flashback, Axiom, Easy NPC, Creator overlays, Orthocamera, and more! It also has shaders but u probably expected that lol.

You can always add your own mods or remove your own but this isn't really a template. If you want a template I might make one but ye have fun! :D

I wouldve used seltops Newnpc mod buttt thats only for 1.20.1 and flashback is too good of a mod but if newnpc updates to 1.21.1 you can bet that its gonna be in this modpack 100%

Comment Section: https://github.com/OmniCoderMC/CreatorCraft/issues/1
